main_headline: Search results for live NBA playoff data from May 2, 2026 were unavailable at time of generation. The structured digest below reflects a data-unavailable state rather than fabricated scores.
sub_headline: Live game results, box scores, and fan sentiment from r/nba could not be retrieved for the night of May 2, 2026.

recaps.title: Live Data Retrieval Failed
recaps.body: An attempt was made to search for NBA playoff scores, results, standings, highlights, and performances for 2026-05-03. No verified game data was returned from the search. To avoid presenting fabricated scores or statistics, all game fields are left empty. Please check NBA.com, ESPN, or r/nba directly for accurate Second Round results from the night of May 2, 2026.

headlines.body: Real-time web search did not return confirmed NBA playoff results for May 2, 2026. No scores, leaders, or series updates can be responsibly reported at this time.
r/nba fan sentiment and post-game discussion threads from last night were inaccessible. Community reactions, player grades, and hot-take discourse could not be captured.
This digest intentionally contains no fabricated statistics. All standout performances, play-by-play moments, and series statuses require verified sourcing before publication.
